## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Release / CI / repo maintenance

## User Impact

<!-- What changes for users? Include commands, package managers, or TUI flows affected. -->

## Screenshots / Terminal Output

<!-- For TUI or CLI output changes, attach screenshots from `make screenshots` or paste a short terminal transcript. -->

## Security / Dependencies

- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] New or changed dependencies are justified
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior is described
- [ ] `make security` passes

## Testing

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make script-test` passes
- [ ] `make e2e` passes (if touching intercept/setup logic)
- [ ] `make integration` passes (if touching live API/version resolution)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests

## Release Notes

<!-- One or two bullets suitable for a changelog, or "None". -->
